concerns.text: User Story 1 lacks explicit anchoring to Functional Requirements. While FR-001 clearly serves US-1, this connection is not stated within FR-001 itself.
User Story 2 lacks explicit anchoring to Functional Requirements. While FR-002 clearly serves US-2, this connection is not stated within FR-002 itself.
User Story 3 lacks explicit anchoring to Functional Requirements. While FR-003, FR-004, FR-005, and FR-006 clearly serve US-3, these connections are not stated within those FRs themselves.
SC-001 is anchored to US-3, but the anchoring is weak. It would be stronger to explicitly state how this success criteria directly validates a specific aspect of US-3's acceptance scenarios.
SC-002 is anchored to US-3, but the anchoring is weak. It would be stronger to explicitly state how this success criteria directly validates a specific aspect of US-3's acceptance scenarios.
SC-003 is anchored to US-3, but the anchoring is weak. It would be stronger to explicitly state how this success criteria directly validates a specific aspect of US-3's acceptance scenarios.
SC-004 is anchored to US-3, but the anchoring is weak. It would be stronger to explicitly state how this success criteria directly validates a specific aspect of US-3's acceptance scenarios.
